zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell於1412年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow42歲，母親Marjorie Marceline Stewart37歲。他於1432年1月17日與Lady Elizabeth Somerville在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年3月22日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾蒙享年28歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell于1412年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow42岁，母亲Marjorie Marceline Stewart37岁。他于1432年1月17日与Lady Elizabeth Somerville在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年3月22日在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾蒙享年28岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell was born in 1412, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow, was 42 and his mother, Marjorie Marceline Stewart, was 37. He married Lady Elizabeth Somerville on 17 January 1432, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 22 March 1440, in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 28, and was buried in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell est né en 1412, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Marceline Stewart, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Somerville le 17 janvier 1432, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1440, à Kilmun, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell 1412 in Lochawe, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow 42 und seine Mutter Marjorie Marceline Stewart 37. Er hat am 17. Januar 1432 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland Lady Elizabeth Somerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 22. März 1440 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbellが1412年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochowは42歳，母Marjorie Marceline Stewartは37歳であった。1432年1月17日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスでLady Elizabeth Somervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年3月22日にスコットランドアルグイルキルムンで28歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルムンキルムン パーイッシュ チャーチ アンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmu: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell(이)가 1412년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Marceline Stewart(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1432년 1월 17일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 Lady Elizabeth Somerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 3월 22일 스컷랜드 아그이 킬먼에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

ru.Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmu: килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell родился в 1412 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Marceline Stewart, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Somerville 17 января 1432 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 22 марта 1440 г. в местности килмун, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 28 лет и был похоронен в местности килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Somerville el 17 de enero de 1432, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1440, en Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
